import time

from prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram

REQUEST_COUNT = Counter("http_requests_total", "Total requests", ["method", "endpoint"])
REQUEST_LATENCY = Histogram("http_request_duration_seconds", "Request latency")


def process_batch(items: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    results = []
    start = time.time()
    for batch in chunk(items, 100):
        batch_results = [transform(item) for item in batch]
        results.extend(batch_results)
    duration = time.time() - start
    REQUEST_COUNT.labels(method="POST", endpoint="/process").inc(len(items))
    REQUEST_LATENCY.observe(duration)
    return results


def transform(item: dict) -> dict:
    return item


def chunk(lst, size):
    for i in range(0, len(lst), size):
        yield lst[i : i + size]


def aggregate_metrics(records: list[dict]) -> dict:
    totals = {}
    for record in records:
        for key, value in record.items():
            totals[key] = totals.get(key, 0) + value
    REQUEST_COUNT.labels(method="GET", endpoint="/aggregate").inc(len(records))
    return totals
